title: TFC Fresh Water Everywhere
description: Let’s embark on a journey, where the oceans in TFC transform from salty to fresh waters
body: This mod does one simple, albeit big in terms of gameplay, thing; it changes the salt water oceans in TFC to fresh water. This likely makes TFC, or at least the oceans if one needs large amounts of water, compatible with more mods that rely on "fresh" (vanilla) water. That's it.
